body_txt: An Aesop is one of the most played with tropes in fiction. It has come to the point where parodies of them are becoming as repetitive as the morals themselves. There are several common ways to do this:  When adding examples, bear in mind that just because a work is a spoof and has An Aesop , it's not necessarily a Spoof Aesop automatically. See also Broken Aesop for when "action doesn't support the aesop" is unintentional. To add these to other works, check out Warp That Aesop .
